name: GT-orderunit-norm-formula
source: HOS Handbook of Operator Algebras (joa-m) @ refs/hos/joa-m.md:370 (§1.2.1). On an order unit space A with order unit e, the order norm is ||a||=inf{lambda>0: -lambda e <= a <= lambda e}. Used for the coordinate-norm bounds ||x_r||<=||x|| in the direct sum. VERBATIM: "$$||a|| = \inf\{\lambda > 0: -\lambda e \le a \le \lambda e\}.$$"
